priority_terms.definition: Equity is your chance to win the pot if all cards fall.
A probe is a smaller turn bet after the other player checks back the flop.
Blockers are cards in your hand that remove some opponent combinations.
SPR, or stack-to-pot ratio, compares the stack left with the pot.
EV, or expected value, is the average result of making the same decision many times.
An exploit is an adjustment that uses a clear opponent tendency.
